title: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
author: Hacker News (Best)
summary: A survey reveals that 60% of US consumers find the term 'AI' in brand messaging a turnoff, suggesting companies should reconsider how they communicate AI features to avoid alienating potential customers. This highlights a growing skepticism and fatigue towards AI hype, which could impact product adoption and marketing strategies.
